name: Refurbish the Barracks Block
desc: The barracks are structurally sound but undersized for a growing operation. Strip out the temporary partitions, run new mana-conduit for environmental regulation, and bunk another six personnel.
flavour: Six more beds. Six more contractors on the payroll. The fort starts to feel like an organisation.

name: Reactivate the Fabrication Shop
desc: The forge and mana-lathe are still serviceable under the rust. Clean the equipment, restore the mana-feed line, and the company's gear stays field-rated. Clients notice when your equipment is maintained.
flavour: Field-rated gear at all times. The margin difference is measurable.

name: Restore the Observation Tower
desc: Wire the tower with a mana-resonance scanner and a comms relay. Advance threat assessment means the company deploys faster — you know what you are walking into before the brief.
flavour: Forewarned is profitable. Unforewarned is expensive.

name: Commission the Medical Bay
desc: Proper triage equipment, a mana-stabilisation field, a licensed recovery-working station, and a medic who knows which end of a resonance scanner matters. Keeps the commanding officer operational between deployments.
flavour: An operational commander is worth more than an expensive memorial.

name: Commission the Operations Hall
desc: Gut the old great hall, install proper briefing infrastructure, a contractor lounge, and a reputation board visible to incoming recruits. Word travels. The quality of recruits who respond to that word improves.
flavour: The calibre of people who answer your posting has changed. They are reading your operation history before they arrive.

name: Establish the Secure Vault
desc: Mana-locked vault with biometric keying and a monitored transfer ledger. Your mana-credit holdings are secure. Clients who can see you are financially stable pay better.
flavour: Financial credibility is a force multiplier.

name: Stock the Equipment Depot
desc: Full equipment certification, load-out standardisation, and a maintained gear pool. Every contractor arrives at brief properly equipped. The commanding officer's gear is always mission-ready.
flavour: Calibrated equipment is the difference between a field rating and a liability.

name: Upgrade the Vehicle Bay
desc: Expand the vehicle pool with mana-cell charging infrastructure and two additional ground units. Faster deployment means more contracts completed per cycle. Personnel stop arriving at operational briefs mud-covered and late.
flavour: Deployment time is overhead. Reduce overhead.

name: Commission the Arcane Array
desc: The fort's undercroft sits above a natural mana-confluence point. Install a precision array, calibrate the resonance nodes, and the facility becomes a Class B arcane operations site. Clients with sensitive arcane requirements will know.
effect: +5 company arcane rating; unlocks arcane contracts
flavour: The ambient readings changed when the array went live. Personnel with any mana-sensitivity noticed immediately.

name: Construct the Containment Suite
desc: A mana-hardened containment room rated for volatile entities, bound constructs, and unstable arcane materials. Clients who need something held securely — rather than destroyed, which is messier — will pay a significant premium.
flavour: The suite has seven independent locking mechanisms. Three of them are designed to operate against things that do not have hands.

name: Establish the Archive Vault
desc: A sanctified documentation and containment facility for recovered arcane artefacts and metaphysically sensitive materials. Proper cataloguing means recovered items are not liabilities. They are inventory.
effect: +15% reward on dungeon contracts; enhances death-spectrum workings
flavour: Everything in the vault is labelled, dated, and contained. The alternative was three separate incidents.

name: Establish the Operations Centre
desc: Multi-screen tactical display, live mana-grid overlay, secure comms to all active units. The company can now coordinate parallel contract deployments from a single command point.
flavour: Every contract is won in the planning room before a single person moves.

name: Deploy the Relay Network
desc: Three encrypted mana-relay stations on the surrounding ridge lines, hardened against interference. Scattered assets are recalled faster. Advance units transmit intelligence before the main team even briefs.
effect: -20% duration on scouting and bounty contracts
flavour: Real-time comms change every operational calculation.

name: Install the Specimen Repository
desc: Classified arcane artefact storage rated for hazardous-category materials. Recovered items from arcane and deep-site contracts are catalogued, contained, and available for analysis. The XP from handling such materials is not trivial.
effect: +15% XP from arcane and dungeon contracts
flavour: Half of it is unclassified. Half is classified but readable. The last section has a lock and a notation that simply says 'not yet'.

name: Install the Mana-Tap Array
desc: The mana-confluence beneath the fort runs at depth. A precision extraction array draws ambient mana directly into the facility's grid, flooding every working station with supplementary mana-flow. Arcane output across the company doubles.
effect: Doubles all arcane bonuses; +10% fame from arcane contracts
flavour: The diagnostic readout after installation was so anomalous the technician ran it three times. Then accepted the result.

name: Install the Ward-Gate System
desc: The fort's access points are fitted with full-spectrum mana-monitoring arrays, entity-repulsion fields, and a resonance signature that registers on every arcane-monitoring network in the region. The facility is now unmistakably classified as a mana-active site.
effect: Fort fully warded; unlocks the highest tier arcane contracts
flavour: The gate does not just keep things out. It tells the things what they are dealing with before they decide to try.

name: Commission the Restoration Suite
desc: Dedicated mana-wellness and recovery facilities. Properly calibrated ambient mana-field, meditation isolation rooms, and a resonance-aligned recovery working station. Personnel recover faster. The commanding officer stops coming into briefings still carrying the last operation.
flavour: Recovery is not downtime. Recovery is maintenance. Maintained assets perform better.

name: Build the Intelligence Archive
desc: A secure research and reference facility covering operational history, technical manuals, arcane theory, and classified contract files. Contractors who study improve faster. Recruits who join an operation with a working archive arrive better prepared.
effect: -10% XP to level; +1 CUN to new recruits
flavour: An organisation with institutional memory operates differently from one that relearns everything every cycle.

name: Upgrade Perimeter Security
desc: Hardened perimeter walls, mana-detection arrays on all approaches, reinforced access points, and overlapping fields of fire. The fort stops being a base of operations and becomes a military asset that requires a serious operation to threaten.
effect: Enables territorial contracts; boosts suppression resistance
flavour: A fortified position is a political statement as well as a military one.

name: Build the Intelligence Network
desc: A distributed network of contracted informants, mana-encrypted dead-drops, and a well-positioned analyst embedded in a regional authority's data division. You will know what the Accord powers are planning before they finalise the brief.
flavour: The best response to a threat is reading it three weeks before it is filed.

name: Staff the Diplomatic Office
desc: A small professional team of Accord-trained diplomats and contract negotiators who can represent the Iron Company at treaty tables, licensing hearings, and government meetings. Not every problem is a field operation.
effect: +25% rewards on political contracts; reduces nation threat escalation
flavour: Contracts won at a table are cheaper than contracts won in the field. Staff accordingly.

name: Commission the Media Relations Unit
desc: A licensed broadcast terminal, a contracted narrative specialist, and a distribution network capable of placing a press release in every major city-state feed within forty-eight hours. The Iron Company's public profile is now an asset that can be actively managed.
flavour: You are not just what you do. You are the version of what you do that reaches the public record.

name: Build the Strategic Command Suite
desc: A dedicated strategic operations floor with long-range encrypted comms, an integrated mana-grid tactical display covering the full operational region, and dedicated command staff. The operations centre handles tactics. This handles strategy.
effect: +4 simultaneous active contracts; unlocks nation-tier operations
flavour: A commander who cannot see the full operational picture is managing chaos. This is not that.

name: Install the Mana-Artillery Platform
desc: Long-range mana-ordnance platforms, arc-fire guidance arrays, and one prototype system the engineer insists falls within Accord treaty definitions. The fort now registers as a hardened military installation on every threat assessment in the region.
effect: +20% rewards on combat and siege contracts; enables heavy assault operations
flavour: The effective range at which you become a problem for someone has increased significantly.

name: Establish the Secure Supply Chain
desc: A defended and encrypted logistics corridor from the fort to two regional supply hubs. Mana-cell resupply, equipment replacement, and specialist materials arrive on schedule regardless of what the surrounding political environment is doing. The Iron Company cannot be embargoed out of operation.
effect: Blockade immunity; supply independence from all economic suppression
flavour: A properly logistics-secured operation is significantly harder to strangle.
